name: Salmon-Pasta Skillet
recipeIngredient: 2 pkgs. cream cheese with chives, cut into cubes
15 1/2 oz. salmon, drained and flaked (skin and bones removed)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, bring chicken broth to boiling.
2. Add pasta and vegetables. Cover and simmer for 15 to 20 minutes or until pasta is just tender.
3. Stir in cream cheese until combined.
4. Stir in milk, Parmesan, mustard, basil, and a dash of pepper.
5. Gently stir in salmon until heated through.
